# Negative positioning

## When to use

Use in crowded categories.

## Why it works

Says who it is not for.

## Mechanism

Filtering builds trust and fit.

## Required inputs

For/against page, precise ICP.

## When not to use

If market is too small.

## Campaign artifact checklist

```text
Buyer state:
Audience:
Pain phrase:
Offer:
Proof asset:
Landing page:
Ad variants:
Measurement event:
Kill rule:
Next test if failed:
```

## Metrics

Lead quality, sales efficiency.

## Agent instruction

Generate at least five ad variants, one landing-page proof path, one measurement plan, and one learning memo template for this tactic.
